reasoning: For the market to resolve 'No', Bitcoin's minimum price on the Binance 1-minute chart must stay strictly above $99,999.99 for the entire 5.5-month window (July 14, 2025 to December 31, 2025). Given Bitcoin's inherent volatility, historical drawdowns during bull cycles (which often exceed 30%), and the fact that it would need to establish and maintain a very strong base well above $100k (e.g., $130k+) to avoid a single 1-minute candle dropping below $100k over nearly half a year, the probability of at least one candle registering a low of $99,999.99 or lower is very high. Furthermore, if Bitcoin simply fails to stay above $100k by the start of the window, the market resolves 'Yes' almost immediately.
